items.name: types
items.title: Types
items.description: Shared type definitions for shadcn-lynx components.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Displays a form input field or a component that looks like an input field.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Displays a callout for user attention.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content in a panel that slides in from the edge.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button click.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons (radio buttons) where only one can be checked at a time.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: Build accessible and validated forms with ease.
